creator: michaelbuch12@gmail.com
text:
The configure script tries to match on noclang-4.*, noclang-5.*, noclang-6.* and fails for versions above although they are, as per the error message at least, supposed to be supported.

If there are no objections, I'll send a patch with simply checking whether the version is above 4.*

Compilation worked for me on gcc 8.2
